goal: As a department head who holds both attendance.ot.create and attendance.ot.approve, file your OWN overtime request and attempt to approve it. The system MUST refuse it (segregation of duties).

postconditions.text_contains: You cannot approve your own overtime request.

verified_live: Before fix: self-approve -> HTTP 200 approved (guard dead — OvertimeService.php read $ot->employee?->user_id, a non-existent column). After fix ($ot->employee?->user?->id + controller try/catch -> 422): self-approve -> 422 'You cannot approve your own overtime request.', a different approver -> 200. Regression: api/tests/Feature/Attendance/OvertimeSelfApprovalSodTest.php.
